title: Acinodendron sarmentosum
intro: Acinodendron sarmentosum, also known as "Ipê", is a flowering plant species native to the tropical regions of Central and South America, belonging to the family Melastomataceae. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, pain, and inflammation, due to its potential health benefits such as anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral properties. The bioactive constituents of Acinodendron sarmentosum include flavonoids, alkaloids, and terpenoids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. In herbal medicine, Acinodendron sarmentosum is commonly prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, which is often used to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis, coughs, and colds.
taxonomy: I found some information about Acinodendron sarmentosum.  Acinodendron sarmentosum is classified under the family Melastomataceae.
